Notes: 9th Annual Starters Moravian Winter Classic Championship Game
Moravian's Alexandra Blair & Kirsty Stearns and Jackie Dooley from Gwynedd-
Mercy named to All-Tournament Team.  Moravian's Kate Harrison named Tournament
MVP for 2nd time in three seasons as Moravian wins 6th tournament title.
Game.Officials: Tom Cramer (R),  Karen Pammer (U1),  Jeffrey O'Brien (U2)
